segments.text: A message from the Lord came to me, saying,
Son of man, there were once two women. They were daughters of the same mother.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They became prostitutes in Egypt. In fact, they were prostitutes from the time they were young. They allowed their virgin breasts to be fondled and their nipples squeezed.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The older girl was called Oholah, and her sister Oholibah.  I married them both and they had sons and daughters. Oholah represents Samaria, and Oholibah represents Jerusalem.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Oholah prostituted herself while she was still married to me. She wanted to have sex with her lovers, the Assyrians.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They were soldiers dressed in blue, leaders and commanders, all of them handsome young men in the cavalry.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: She gave away herself sexually to all the important men of Assyria. She made herself unclean by her worship of all the idols of those men she wanted to have sex with.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: She didn't stop her prostitution that she started in Egypt—men sleeping with her when she was young, squeezing her virgin breasts and using her to satisfy their sexual appetite.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: So I handed her over to her lovers, the Assyrians she wanted to have sex with.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They stripped her naked, took away her sons and daughters, and killed her with the sword. She became infamous among women, and they punished her.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Oholibah saw what happened to her sister, but she became even worse than her in her wanting sex and practicing prostitution.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: She also wanted to have sex with the Assyrians: their leaders and commanders, their splendidly-dressed soldiers—all of them handsome young men in the cavalry.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I saw that she had also made herself unclean—both sisters were doing the same thing.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: However, Oholibah's prostitution was even worse. She saw pictures of Babylonian soldiers wearing bright red uniforms painted on the wall.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They were wearing belts on their waists and large turbans on their heads. They all looked like Babylonian officers in Chaldea, the country where they were born.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: When she saw the paintings of them, she wanted to have sex with them and sent messengers to them in Chaldea.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The Babylonians came to her and her love bed, and made her unclean with their sexual desire. However, after she had been dishonored by them, she rejected them in disgust.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: When Oholibah so blatantly prostituted herself, exposing herself naked, I turned away from her in disgust, just as I had done to her sister.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: But she practiced even more prostitution, remembering how she'd been a prostitute in Egypt when she was young.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: She wanted to have sex with her lovers who had genitals like donkeys and who ejaculated like stallions.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: You went back to the indecent acts from when you were young, when the Egyptians squeezed your nipples and fondled your young breasts.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: So Oholibah, this is what the Lord God says: I'm going to encourage your lovers to attack you, those you rejected in disgust. I will bring them to attack you from every direction:
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: the Babylonians and all the Chaldeans, the men of Pekod, Shoa, and Koa, and all the Assyrians along with them—all handsome young men, leaders and commanders, chariot captains and important officers, all riding horses.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They will attack you from the north,  invading with a great army, chariots, and wagons. They will come with their shields and helmets and surround you. I will hand you over to them for punishment, and they will judge and punish you following their own laws.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I feel so strongly about what you've done that I will oppose you, and they will treat you very badly. They will cut off your noses and ears, and they will kill those of you who are left. They will take away your sons and daughters as prisoners, and those of you who are left will be destroyed by fire.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They will tear off your clothes and take your beautiful jewelry.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I'm going to put a stop to your immorality and prostitution, which started in Egypt. You won't think longingly about those times, and you'll forget all about Egypt.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: For this is what the Lord God says: Believe it when I say that I'm going to hand you over to the people you hate, the ones you rejected in disgust.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They will treat you with hatred. They will take away everything you've worked for, leaving you stark naked with nothing, so that the indecent acts of your prostitution will be exposed. Your immorality and prostitution
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: is why all this has happened to you, because you acted as a prostitute with the nations and made yourself unclean by worshiping their idols.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Because you did what your sister did, I will give you her cup to drink.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: This is what the Lord God says: You will drink from your sister's cup—a large, deep cup. You will be laughed at and insulted. You'll have to endure much of this.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: It will make you drunk and full of grief because it's a cup of that brings horror and destruction, the cup your sister Samaria drank from.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: You will drink it all down, smash it to pieces on the ground, and tear at your breasts. This is what I have spoken, declares the Lord God.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: In summary this is what the Lord God says: Because you have forgotten about me and have ignored me, you will have to experience the consequences of your immorality and prostitution.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Then the Lord said to me:
Son of man, are you going to condemn Oholah and Oholibah? Expose the disgusting things they've done!
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: For they have committed adultery, and they are guilty of murder. They have committed adultery with their idols, and have even offered their children, whom they had for me, as sacrifices to their idols.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: They also did this to me: On the very same day they both made my sanctuary unclean and violated my Sabbaths.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: On the very day that they killed their children for their idols, they went into my sanctuary and made it unclean. Look at what they did right inside my Temple!
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: They even kept on sending messengers for men to come from far away. When the men arrived, you would get yourselves ready for them by bathing, doing your eye makeup, and putting on your jewelry.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: You sat on an expensive couch, with my incense and my oil on a table placed in front of it.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: The room was full of the noise of people partying. Drunk men were brought in from the desert along with some common people and they put bracelets on your wrists and beautiful crowns on your head.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Then I said about the old worn-out woman, ‘Now they can have her as a prostitute because that's what she is!’
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: So they had sex with her like a prostitute. They had sex with Oholah and Oholibah, those immoral women.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: But men who believe in doing what's right will judge them and impose the punishment for committing adultery and murder, because they are adulterers and murderers.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: This is what the Lord God says: Have a mob attack them! Make them terrified and rob them.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: The mob will stone them and kill them with their swords, slaughtering their sons and daughters and burning down their houses.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: This is how I will put an end to immorality in the country, and all the women will be warned not to do what you have done.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: They will punish you for your immorality, and you will have to experience the consequences of your idol worship. Then you will know that I am the Lord God.
segments.speaker: the Lord
